시편 150:1.content: Praise Yah! Praise God in his sanctuary! Praise him in his heavens for his acts of power!

시편 150:2.content: Praise him for his mighty acts! Praise him according to his excellent greatness!

시편 150:3.content: Praise him with the sounding of the trumpet! Praise him with harp and lyre!

시편 150:4.content: Praise him with tambourine and dancing! Praise him with stringed instruments and flute!

시편 150:5.content: Praise him with loud cymbals! Praise him with resounding cymbals!

시편 150:6.content: Let everything that has breath praise Yah! Praise Yah!
